title: phaius tonkinensis
intro: Phaius tonkinensis, also known as the Tonkin orchid or Chinese orchid, is a type of flowering plant in the orchid family that is native to China and Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Phaius tonkinensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs and colds, and aid in the treatment of respiratory problems such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Phaius tonkinensis is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health issues.
